title: Common Security Anti-Patterns
concept: Ungoverned terminal execution, direct SQL execution from prompt, and missing token budgets.

exercises.prompt: What should be checked to ensure agent safety before executing actions?

options.text: Agent does not need to check anything

exercises.explain: Ensuring the input is filtered is a key step to maintain agent safety before actions are taken.

cards.title: Be Aware of Security Anti-Patterns
cards.body: Security anti-patterns are common mistakes that can lead to vulnerabilities. Understanding them helps us keep our systems secure.

cards.title: What Are Anti-Patterns?
cards.body: Anti-patterns are poor solutions to problems that may seem okay at first, but can lead to bigger issues later.

cards.title: Like False Friends in Language
cards.body: Some words in learning languages seem similar but mean different things. Security anti-patterns look safe but can be harmful!

cards.title: Example of Ungoverned Execution
cards.body: If an AI can execute code without restrictions, it could cause issues like deleting important files. We need to govern its actions!

cards.title: Myth: SQL is Always Safe
cards.body: Many think SQL commands are safe, but executing them directly from prompts can lead to accessing sensitive data.

cards.title: Understanding Security Anti-Patterns
cards.body: Let's compare safe and unsafe practices in agent execution.

exercises.prompt: What is a danger of direct SQL execution from a prompt?

options.text: It help agents make better decisions

exercises.explain: Direct SQL execution can expose sensitive data. It's crucial to handle SQL commands with care.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Missing token budgets are a security anti-pattern.
exercises.explain: True! Missing token budgets can lead to unmanaged costs or actions, creating vulnerabilities.

exercises.prompt: A lack of _______ in executing actions can lead to vulnerabilities.
exercises.sentence: A lack of governance in executing actions can lead to vulnerabilities.
exercises.explain: The correct word is 'governance'. Without governance, systems can act unpredictably.

exercises.prompt: Which phrase was generated by an AI about security anti-patterns?

options.text: Direct SQL commands make systems stronger
Uncontrolled execution can lead to serious risks

exercises.explain: The AI correctly highlighted that uncontrolled execution poses real risks, unlike the other options.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is NOT a security anti-pattern?
exercises.explain: Setting token budgets is a best practice for managing AI actions. The others are examples of anti-patterns and can lead to risks.
